focus: DX fixes — dedup fetchWithTimeout, error consistency, centralize Ollama URL, remove dead exports
typecheckNote: 3 pre-existing type errors (TaskItem.tsx unused var, VoiceContext.tsx unknown→Record cast) — not introduced by this round

fixes.title: Extract fetchWithTimeout to shared utility
fixes.description: Created src/ai/provider/adapters/fetch-utils.ts with shared fetchWithTimeout and FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS. Updated ollama.ts, lmstudio.ts, and openai-compat.ts to import from the shared module instead of defining their own copies.

fixes.title: Fix generic Error throw in cycle detection
fixes.description: Changed tasks.ts:513 from `new Error()` to `new ValidationError()` for cycle detection in addRelation(), consistent with the rest of core/ error handling. Added ValidationError to the import from core/errors.ts.

fixes.title: Centralize Ollama base URL constant
fixes.description: Added DEFAULT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:11434' to src/config/defaults.ts (matching the existing DEFAULT_LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL pattern). Updated ollama.ts to import and use it for both the native API base and the /v1 OpenAI-compat URL.

fixes.title: Remove dead COMMAND_PALETTE_HOTKEY export
fixes.description: Removed COMMAND_PALETTE_HOTKEY from defaults.ts. Verified with grep: never imported anywhere in src/. The hotkey is hardcoded in consumer files (useAppShortcuts.ts, SidebarHeader.tsx, StepReady.tsx) — wiring them to a shared constant is a separate concern.

fixes.title: Remove dead MAX_TASK_TITLE_LENGTH and MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH exports
fixes.description: Removed both constants from defaults.ts. Verified with grep: never imported anywhere in src/. No validation currently enforces these limits.

deferred.title: 106 silent catch blocks across 55 files
deferred.reason: Too many instances for one round; requires per-file triage to distinguish intentional graceful degradation from genuine suppression.

deferred.title: PROJECT_COLOR_LABELS duplicates DEFAULT_PROJECT_COLORS data
deferred.reason: Low-risk duplication; consolidation requires updating consumer in AddProjectModal.tsx and is cosmetic.
